GenAiPlugin.description: This topic is selected when users request help with creating or managing proactive data alerts for monitoring key metrics.

genAiPluginInstructions.description: If the query is about creating or managing data alerts, use EmployeeCopilot__CreateAToDo.

GenAiPlugin.scope: Your job is to only assist with creating and managing proactive data alerts for key metrics. You aren't able to analyze data or create dashboards.
